_comment: Base Sepolia has no real Morpho / wstDIEM vault / Curve / Uniswap / Chainlink to point at, so the beta runs against MOCK external protocols. Deploy them with `forge script script/v2/DeployMocks.s.sol:DeployMocks` (see that file's header). The mock/core addresses below are FILLED FROM the DeployMocks console output at deploy time. Do NOT run the canonical `Deploy.s.sol` against this file — DeployMocks bootstraps its own mock venues and fingerprints. Placeholder 0x2000.../0x3000... values are kept only as valid-shaped defaults and MUST be overwritten with the DeployMocks output before the addresses are relied upon.

_deployment._comment: LIVE mock deploy via DeployMocksSepolia.s.sol. REDEPLOYED 2026-07-20 (Phase B of the EIP-712 redeploy #3) on the post-EIP-170-refactor contracts (PRs #9/#10/#11) — the July-12 deployment used the pre-refactor contracts and is now SUPERSEDED (see _superseded below). Phase 1 (deploy + queue) 2026-07-20 blocks 44389682–44389751. Phase C (applyFingerprints) BROADCAST 2026-07-24 after the 130k-block timelock elapsed: fingerprints applied at block 44555942, registryVersion advanced to 2, OPEN+EXIT gates validate true on-chain. Registry is Ownable2Step: applyFingerprints() transferred ownership toward governance (tx block 44555944), then governance called acceptOwnership() at block 44556935 to finalize — registry.owner() is now governance (0xb418…b96A) and pendingOwner is cleared. Registry delegates fingerprint storage/validation to the split-out LoopFingerprintRegistry (fingerprintRegistry below); SDK config.loopFingerprintRegistry must point at it.

_superseded_2026-07-12._comment: Pre-EIP-170-refactor deployment; DO NOT USE. Kept for provenance only. Was live 07-16 (registryVersion 2) until superseded by the 07-20 redeploy above.

markets._comment: market.id is the Morpho market id = keccak256(abi.encode(loanToken, collateralToken, oracle, irm, lltv)); logged by DeployMocksSepolia. Updated 2026-07-20 redeploy.
